files.patch: @@ -491,6 +491,7 @@ {"id":"brenner_bot-ucmp","title":"Task: Add State Transition CLI Commands","description":"# Task: Add State Transition CLI Commands ## Objective Add CLI commands for triggering state transitions and viewing transition history. ## Implementation Details ### Commands #### `brenner hypothesis activate ` ```bash brenner hypothesis activate H-RS20251230-001 # Output: ✓ Activated hypothesis H-RS20251230-001 State: proposed → active ``` #### `brenner hypothesis kill ` ```bash brenner hypothesis kill H-RS20251230-001 \ --test=T-RS20251230-002 \ --reason="ATAC-seq showed open chromatin" # Output: ✓ Killed hypothesis H-RS20251230-001 State: active → killed Killed by: T-RS20251230-002 Reason: ATAC-seq showed open chromatin ``` #### `brenner hypothesis refine ` ```bash brenner hypothesis refine H-RS20251230-001 \ --child=H-RS20251231-001 # Output: ✓ Refined hypothesis H-RS20251230-001 State: active → refined Replaced by: H-RS20251231-001 ``` #### `brenner hypothesis validate ` ```bash brenner hypothesis validate H-RS20251230-001 \ --test=T-RS20251230-003 # Output: ✓ Validated hypothesis H-RS20251230-001 State: active → validated Validated by: T-RS20251230-003 ⚠️ Note: Validation is provisional. New tests may still kill this hypothesis. ``` #### `brenner hypothesis park ` ```bash brenner hypothesis park H-RS20251230-002 \ --reason="Waiting for funding for lineage tracing experiment" # Output: ✓ Parked hypothesis H-RS20251230-002 State: active → dormant Reason: Waiting for funding for lineage tracing experiment ``` #### `brenner hypothesis reactivate ` ```bash brenner hypothesis reactivate H-RS20251230-002 # Output: ✓ Reactivated hypothesis H-RS20251230-002 State: dormant → active ``` #### `brenner hypothesis history ` ```bash brenner hypothesis history H-RS20251230-001 # Output: Timeline for H-RS20251230-001: 2025-12-30T10:00:00Z created (proposed) 2025-12-30T10:05:00Z activated proposed → active 2025-12-31T15:30:00Z killed by T-RS20251230-002 active → killed Reason: ATAC-seq showed open chromatin Current state: killed (terminal) ``` ### Error Handling ```bash brenner hypothesis kill H-RS20251230-001 # Error (missing --test): ✗ Error: Kill transition requires --test= Hypotheses should be killed by specific test results, not arbitrary decisions. Use --reason to explain if no test ID is available. ``` ```bash brenner hypothesis activate H-RS20251230-001 # (if already killed) # Error (invalid transition): ✗ Error: Cannot activate hypothesis in state 'killed' Killed hypotheses are terminal. They cannot be resurrected. Consider creating a new hypothesis instead. ``` ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] All 7 commands implemented - [ ] Required flags enforced (--test for kill, --child for refine) - [ ] Clear error messages for invalid transitions - [ ] History command shows full timeline - [ ] Confirmation prompts for destructive actions (kill) - [ ] `--yes` flag to skip confirmations ## Dependencies - Task: Implement Transition Validator - Task: Create Transition History Logging ## Effort Estimate ~250 lines of code, ~3 hours","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:45:06.785846836-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T12:09:32.801478171-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T12:09:32.801478171-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented all 7 CLI commands: activate, kill/refute, refine/supersede, validate/confirm, park/defer, reactivate, and history. All commands support --json mode, enforce required flags (--test for kill/validate, --child for refine), and log transitions to TransitionHistoryStore. 136 tests pass.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ucmp","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-6n4e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:46:53.203760638-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ucmp","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-a0r7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:46:53.360858756-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ucmp","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-v41w","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:46:53.392165625-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ucmp","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-jcuz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:41:13.587753337-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-ueu","title":"Add debounce to QuoteBank search","description":"","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T23:14:29.387920975-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T00:20:28.134309693-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T00:20:28.134309693-05:00","close_reason":"Added 200ms debounce to QuoteBank search using useDebounce hook"} {"id":"brenner_bot-uk5","title":"Implement global search with command palette","description":"# Task Create a global search experience using a command palette (Cmd+K / Ctrl+K). # Why Command Palette - Familiar UX pattern (VS Code, Slack, Notion, etc.) - Fast access from anywhere - Can search across all content types - Can also trigger actions (not just search) # Search Scope Search across: 1. **Transcript sections** - by text content 2. **Distillations** - by text content 3. **Quote bank** - by quote text 4. **Operators** - by name or definition 5. **Pages** - by title (Corpus, Distillations, Method, etc.) # UI ``` ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ 🔍 Search or type a command... ⌘K │ ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ │ RECENT │ │ 📄 §42: Choice of experimental object │ │ 📄 §87: Abundance trick │ │ │ │ SUGGESTIONS │ │ 📄 Corpus → complete_brenner_transcript.md │ │ 📊 Distillations → Compare models │ │ ⚡ Method → Operator palette │ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ ``` # Implementation Use `cmdk` library (https://cmdk.paco.me/) - lightweight, accessible, customizable. ```tsx import { Command } from 'cmdk'; {recentItems.map(item => ( {item.title} ))} // ... ``` # Search Index Build search index at build time: 1. Parse all markdown files 2. Extract searchable content 3. Store as JSON 4. Use client-side fuzzy search (fuse.js or similar) # Keyboard Shortcuts - `Cmd+K` / `Ctrl+K` - Open search - `Escape` - Close - `↑↓` - Navigate results - `Enter` - Go to result - `Cmd+Enter` - Open in new tab # Actions (Beyond Search) Command palette can also: - 'Go to Corpus' → navigate - 'Toggle dark mode' → action - 'Start new session' → navigate + action # Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Command palette opens with Cmd+K - [ ] Search returns relevant results - [ ] Results grouped by type - [ ] Recent searches shown - [ ] Keyboard navigation works - [ ] Actions work (navigation, etc.) - [ ] Accessible","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:22:55.026628542-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T13:41:09.589330231-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T13:41:09.589330231-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented via SpotlightSearch.tsx - Cmd+K command palette with search across transcript, quotes, distillations, operators; keyboard navigation, actions, and accessibility","labels":["command-palette","search","ux","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-uk5","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8yn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:23:07.039014299-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-uk5","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:28:02.327651525-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} +{"id":"brenner_bot-ukzy","title":"Fresh-eyes code audit + bugfixes","description":"Randomly sample critical code paths (CLI, Agent Mail client, web API routes, proxy/auth gating, protocol kernel). Identify obvious bugs/silly mistakes, add focused tests, and fix. No deletions.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-01T20:38:04.745953374-05:00","updated_at":"2026-01-01T20:38:25.453076875-05:00"} {"id":"brenner_bot-uwe","title":"Task: Implement result highlighting","description":"Highlight matched terms in search results. ## Purpose Highlighting shows users WHY a result matched, helping them quickly identify relevant results. ## Requirements ### In Search Results - Matched terms highlighted in snippet - Distinct visual treatment (bold, color, background) - Must be accessible (not color-only) ### In Document (after navigation) - Scroll matched section into view - Temporary highlight effect (fade after 2-3 seconds) - Clear visual indicator of matched content ## Implementation Approach ### Snippet Highlighting 1. Search engine returns match positions 2. Component wraps matched text in or styled span 3. Style with background and/or bold ### Document Highlighting 1. URL includes search query parameter 2. Document page detects query param 3. Scroll to first match 4. Apply temporary highlight class 5. Remove highlight after timeout ## Styling ```css .search-highlight { background: var(--primary) / 20%; border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 2px; } .temp-highlight { animation: highlight-fade 2s ease-out; } @keyframes highlight-fade { 0% { background: var(--primary) / 40%; } 100% { background: transparent; } } ``` ## Accessibility - Don't rely on color alone - Add sr-only text if needed: 'matched term' - Ensure sufficient contrast ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Matches highlighted in result snippets - [ ] Highlighting is accessible (not color-only) - [ ] After navigation, match scrolled into view - [ ] Temporary highlight on matched section - [ ] Highlight fades naturally - [ ] Works in both light and dark mode","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:30:25.154597345-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T00:05:35.099071119-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T00:05:35.099071119-05:00","close_reason":"HighlightedText component in SpotlightSearch highlights matched terms in snippets. Post-navigation scroll-to-match can be a separate follow-up task.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-uwe","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-d4p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:31:11.947646525-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-uwe","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-dy2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:31:12.082200405-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-v2e","title":"Build native React document renderer with custom components","description":"# Task Build a rich document renderer using NATIVE React/TypeScript components that fully leverage Tailwind and our design system. NOT a generic markdown viewer! # Philosophy The content deserves custom treatment: - Brenner quotes should look *amazing* (not just gray italic blocks) - Operator symbols (⊘, 𝓛, ≡, ✂) should be styled distinctively - Code blocks should use our OKLCH colors - Tables should be interactive, not HTML tables - § anchors should be beautiful and functional # Architecture ``` Markdown source → MDX/AST parser → Custom React components ``` 1. Parse markdown at build time (or server-side) 2. Map each AST node to a custom component 3. Each component uses our design system # Custom Components Needed ## Typography - `...` - `...` - `...` (intro paragraphs) ## Brenner-specific - `...` - Special quote styling with gradient border, attribution - `` - Styled operator with tooltip - `` - Animated anchor with copy functionality ## Content blocks - `...` - Syntax highlighting with our colors - `` - Interactive table with sorting, hover - `...` - Styled callout boxes - `...` - Glossary-style definitions ## Interactive - `` - Copy citation/text - `` - Share to social/clipboard - `...` # Implementation Use `next-mdx-remote` or `@mdx-js/mdx` to: 1. Parse markdown to AST 2. Provide custom components mapping 3. Render with our components ```tsx import { MDXRemote } from 'next-mdx-remote/rsc'; const components = { h1: (props) => , blockquote: (props) => , // ... }; ``` # Quote Styling Example ```tsx function BrennerQuote({ children, source }) { return ( " {children} {source && ( — Sydney Brenner, {source} )} ); } ``` # TOC Generation Still generate TOC from headings, but render with our components: - Sticky sidebar on desktop - Collapsible on mobile - Scroll-spy highlighting - Smooth scroll on click # Acceptance Criteria - [ ] All markdown elements map to custom components - [ ] Typography uses our design system - [ ] Quotes look beautiful (not generic) - [ ] Operators have distinctive styling - [ ] § anchors are interactive - [ ] TOC works with scroll-spy - [ ] Animations respect reduced motion - [ ] Responsive layout","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:14:46.390974262-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T19:29:11.455541735-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T19:29:11.455541735-05:00","close_reason":"Superseded by brenner_bot-5so.4.1.1 + brenner_bot-5so.4.1.2","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-v2e","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8yn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:16:24.931287472-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-v2e","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-y6z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:23:06.908825369-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-v2e","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-wpb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:23:06.941047723-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-v41w","title":"Task: Create Transition History Logging","description":"# Task: Create Transition History Logging ## Objective Implement persistent logging of all state transitions for audit trail and history queries. ## Implementation Details ### File Location `apps/web/src/lib/hypothesis-history.ts` ### Storage Structure ``` .research/ └── transitions/ ├── RS-20251230-transitions.json # Per-session └── ... ``` ### File Format ```json { "sessionId": "RS-20251230", "transitions": [ { "hypothesisId": "H-RS20251230-001", "fromState": "proposed", "toState": "active", "trigger": "activate", "triggeredBy": "user", "timestamp": "2025-12-30T10:05:00Z" }, { "hypothesisId": "H-RS20251230-001", "fromState": "active", "toState": "killed", "trigger": "kill", "triggeredBy": "T-RS20251230-002", "reason": "ATAC-seq showed open chromatin, contradicting methylation-only hypothesis", "timestamp": "2025-12-31T15:30:00Z" } ] } ``` ### Core Functions ```typescript export async function logTransition(transition: StateTransition): Promise export async function getHypothesisHistory(hypothesisId: string): Promise export async function getSessionTransitions(sessionId: string): Promise export async function getTransitionsInRange( start: Date, end: Date ): Promise export interface HypothesisTimeline { hypothesisId: string; statement: string; transitions: Array<{ fromState: HypothesisState; toState: HypothesisState; trigger: TransitionTrigger; timestamp: string; triggeredBy?: string; }>; currentState: HypothesisState; } export async function buildHypothesisTimeline( hypothesisId: string ): Promise ``` ### Query Examples ```typescript // "What killed hypothesis H1?" const history = await getHypothesisHistory('H-RS20251230-001'); const killTransition = history.find(t => t.toState === 'killed'); // → T-RS20251230-002 killed it at 2025-12-31T15:30:00Z // "What happened in session RS-20251230?" const transitions = await getSessionTransitions('RS-20251230'); // → [activate H1, activate H2, kill H1, ...] ``` ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] All transitions logged to per-session files - [ ] Query by hypothesis ID - [ ] Query by session ID - [ ] Query by time range - [ ] Timeline reconstruction shows full history - [ ] Append-only log (no editing history) ## Dependencies - Task: Define State Transition Types ## Effort Estimate ~150 lines of code, ~2 hours","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:45:05.370418529-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T12:04:03.696867615-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T12:04:03.696867615-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented in apps/web/src/lib/schemas/hypothesis-lifecycle.ts: transitionHypothesis function (line 292), TransitionHistoryStore class (line 469), and 72 passing unit tests. All acceptance criteria met.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-v41w","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-6n4e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:46:53.172057824-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-v41w","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-slcc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:46:53.328944504-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-v41w","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-jcuz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:41:08.514542199-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
